title: That “job brief” on Google Forms could infect your device

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — That “job brief” on Google Forms could infect your device
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/23
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_ip:
        dst_ip:
            - '207.148.66.14'
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*2026.zip*'
            - '*dl.dropbox*'
            - '*filedn.com*'
            - '*final.zip*'
            - '*fshare.vn*'
            - '*goo.su*'
            - '*pdf.rar*'
            - '*tr.ee*'
            - '*www.fshare*'
    condition: selection_ip or selection_ip
level: high
